ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label describing the content item */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the content item */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "content_changed" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the content was changed */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the content was deleted */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of content */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific page */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revision of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the action */,
  "data" TEXT /* Arbitrary data related to the action */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user performing the action */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the action was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the action failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the content type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the content type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL slug for the page */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of content */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the page */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the page */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the page */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the page is published */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the page was published */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description of the page for SEO purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content item */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Number of the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was created */,
  "revision_data" TEXT /* Data of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the revision */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the revision is the current version of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the role-permission relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the role-permission relationship */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the role-permission relationship is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
